chunks.text: Technical Reports - Arthur R. Bergen. Stability Studies of Multimachine Power Systems with the Effects of Automatic Voltage Regulators (M84/39) by H. Miyagi and Arthur R. Bergen.
chunks.question: What is the title of the technical report by H. Miyagi and Arthur R. Bergen?
chunks.answer: Stability Studies of Multimachine Power Systems.

chunks.text: Application of Singular Perturbation Techniques to Power System Transient Stability Techniques (M84/7) by C.L. DeMarco and Arthur R. Bergen.
chunks.question: Who co-authored the report on singular perturbation techniques?
chunks.answer: C.L. DeMarco and Arthur R. Bergen.
